responses: Hello! Welcome to PDA College Admission Assistant. How can I help you?
Hi there! Ask me about departments, placements, research centers or contact details.
PDA College of Engineering is located in Kalaburagi (Gulbarga), Karnataka, India.
PDA College of Engineering was established in 1958 and is one of the oldest engineering colleges in Karnataka.
Departments include Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronics, Mechanical, Civil, Electrical and Information Science.
PDA College has produced many VTU gold medalists and university rank holders.
PDA College has a dedicated placement cell. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro and Accenture visit for campus recruitment.
PDA College has VTU approved research centers in Computer Science, Mechanical, Civil and Electronics Engineering.
You can contact PDA College at +91-8472-224360.
You can reach the college via email at info@pdaengg.com.
Thank you for visiting PDA Admission Assistant. Have a great day!
